title: Ad Testing Matrix
description: Structured 12-ad testing matrix produced by /positioning-angles and /creative (ad mode). Maps hooks against formats to create a systematic ad testing grid. Designed for downstream automation -- feeding ad variants to Meta Ads, Google Ads, or other ad platforms for campaign creation.

matrix_name.description: Human-readable name for this test matrix, e.g. 'Q1 Launch Ad Matrix' or 'Lead Magnet Promotion Tests'.

created_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this matrix was created.

created_by.description: The skill that created this matrix, e.g. '/positioning-angles' or '/creative'.

campaign_ref.description: Path to the campaign this matrix belongs to, e.g. './campaigns/q1-launch/'.

positioning_angle.description: The positioning angle being tested across all ads in this matrix.

target_audience.description: The audience segment these ads target, e.g. 'Freelancers making $3-8k/month'.

destination_url.description: Landing page URL (or placeholder) that all ads in this matrix drive to.

hooks.description: The hook variations (rows in the matrix). Each hook is a different messaging angle or opening.

hook_id.description: Short identifier for this hook, e.g. 'H1', 'H2', 'H3'.

hook_name.description: Descriptive name for the hook angle, e.g. 'Pain Point', 'Social Proof', 'Curiosity Gap', 'Direct Benefit'.

hook_text.description: The actual hook copy or headline, e.g. 'Most freelancers undercharge by 40%. Here is the fix.'

psychology.description: The persuasion principle at work, e.g. 'Loss aversion', 'Authority + specificity', 'Pattern interrupt'.

formats.description: The format variations (columns in the matrix). Each format is a different ad creative type.

format_id.description: Short identifier for this format, e.g. 'F1', 'F2', 'F3', 'F4'.

format_name.description: Creative format type, e.g. 'Static Image', 'Carousel', 'Short Video', 'UGC-Style'.

platform.description: Primary platform this format is optimized for, e.g. 'Meta', 'Google', 'LinkedIn', 'TikTok'.

specs.description: Any format-specific requirements, e.g. 'Max 30 seconds', '2-10 carousel cards', 'Text overlay under 20%'.

cells.description: The individual ad variants. Each cell is one hook crossed with one format, producing a unique ad creative.

cell_id.description: Unique identifier for this cell, e.g. 'H1-F1', 'H2-F3'.

hook_id.description: Reference to the hook used in this cell.

format_id.description: Reference to the format used in this cell.

headline.description: Ad headline text for this specific variant.

body_copy.description: Ad body copy for this variant.

cta_text.description: Call-to-action button text, e.g. 'Download Free', 'Learn More', 'Get Started'.

image_prompt.description: AI image generation prompt for this ad creative (used by /creative).

image_path.description: Path to the generated image file, if it exists.

video_prompt.description: AI video generation prompt for this ad creative (if video format).

video_path.description: Path to the generated video file, if it exists.

status.description: Current production status of this ad variant.

performance.description: Performance data once the ad is live. Populated after launch.

conversions.description: Total conversions (as defined by campaign goal).

spend.description: Total ad spend on this variant.

notes.description: Performance observations, e.g. 'Best performer in first 48 hours'.
Any additional notes about this specific ad variant.

test_plan.description: How to run the test systematically.

budget.description: Recommended total test budget, e.g. '$500' or '$50/variant'.

success_metric.description: Primary metric to judge winners, e.g. 'CTR', 'CPA', 'Conversion rate'.

kill_criteria.description: When to kill underperformers, e.g. 'Under 0.5% CTR after 1000 impressions'.

scale_criteria.description: When to scale winners, e.g. 'Over 2% CTR after 48 hours'.
